Based on the README.md file in the webapp project (`projects/webapp/docs/README.md`), here are all the API endpoints mentioned:

| Method | Endpoint | Description |
|--------|----------|-------------|
| `GET` | `/api/users` | List all users |
| `POST` | `/api/users` | Create a new user |
| `GET` | `/api/health` | Health check |

The README also mentions the project is a simple HTTP server for user management and uses a controller pattern where routes map to handler functions.
